creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

Selby Botanical Gardens in Sarasota, Florida, is a must when visiting the area! I loved the koi fish pond! Have you been?

#botanicalgardens #hiddengemsflorida #selbygardens

transcription.text: Fairytale Places in Florida, Part Three. Welcome to Selby Botanical Gardens in Sarasota, Florida. The former home of Marie Selby is a 15-acre urban tropical garden oasis situated right on the Sarasota Bay from which you can see downtown Sarasota and the Ringling Bridge. Selby Gardens is the only botanical garden in the world dedicated to the study of orchids and they are everywhere. There are so many beautiful walking paths and pretty spots to sit and enjoy the grounds. There is an amazing interactive playground featuring the largest ficus tree I've ever seen, treetop, swinging bridges, waterfalls, and instruments to play. Take a listen. Selby Gardens also hosts a rotating exhibit of well-known artists. During my visit, the featured artist was Yohoi Kusama. I highly recommend buying a $2 bag of fish food to feed the huge and colorful koi fish. This was one of my favorite parts of the gardens. I would also allow for at least two hours but you could easily spend a whole day here enjoying the grounds and having lunch at their on-site restaurant, The Green Orchid by Michael's on East, which is run completely on solar power. Be sure to follow along and send this post to someone you would want to visit here with.
